description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pyslang that can be triggered manually, on push to the master branch, or on pull requests. The workflow should have a build job that runs on multiple platforms (Windows, macOS, Ubuntu) and Python versions (3.6, 3.10, PyPy 3.8). For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up the specified Python version, upgrade pip, install pytest, build and install pyslang, and run tests with pytest.
